def subsystem(file: str) -> str:
    p = Path(file)
    parts = p.parts
    if parts[0] == "static":
        if "groupStore" in file:
            return "frontend:groupStore"
        if "types" in file:
            return "frontend:groupTypes"
        if "sharedGroupDetails" in file:
            return "frontend:sharedGroupDetails"
        if "gsAdmin" in file:
            return "frontend:admin"
        return "frontend"
    if parts[0] == "src" and parts[1] == "sentry":
        if len(parts) >= 3:
            return parts[2]
    return "other"


def build_output():
    # Step 3: flat list of file:line (one per dependent)
    flat = sorted({f"{file}:{line}" for file, line, *_ in ENTRIES})

    # Step 4: group by subsystem
    grouped = defaultdict(list)
    for file, line, name, sub, depends, *_ in ENTRIES:
        grouped[sub].append({"file:line": f"{file}:{line}", "symbol": name, "depends": depends})
    step4 = {k: grouped[k] for k in sorted(grouped)}

    # Step 5: risk ranking
    risk_buckets = defaultdict(list)
    for file, line, name, sub, depends, risk, notes in ENTRIES:
        risk_buckets[risk].append({
            "file:line": f"{file}:{line}",
            "symbol": name,
            "subsystem": sub,
            "depends": depends,
            "notes": notes,
        })
    step5 = {
        "high": risk_buckets["high"],
        "medium": risk_buckets["medium"],
        "low": risk_buckets["low"],
    }

    # Step 6: non-obvious dependents (unexpected subsystems or hold reference without obvious issue logic)
    non_obvious_subsystems = {
        "buffer", "data_export", "digests", "monitors", "replays", "feedback",
        "rules", "sentry_apps", "seer", "workflow_engine", "mockdata", "web_debug",
        "grouping", "merge_redirect", "open_periods", "event_attachments", "action_log"
    }
    step6 = [
        {
            "file:line": f"{file}:{line}",
            "symbol": name,
            "subsystem": sub,
            "why_easy_to_miss": notes,
        }
        for file, line, name, sub, depends, risk, notes in ENTRIES
        if sub in non_obvious_subsystems
    ]

    # Step 7: change map = grouped list with check note
    step7 = {}
    for sub, items in step4.items():
        step7[sub] = [
            {
                "file:line": item["file:line"],
                "symbol": item["symbol"],
                "depends": item["depends"],
                "must_check": "FK/field schema" if "FK" in item["depends"] or "group_id" in item["depends"] else "Group field/attr access",
            }
            for item in items
        ]

    return {
        "step1": {
            "project": "Sentry — open-source error tracking and performance monitoring.",
            "code_organization": {
                "backend": "src/sentry (Django/Celery, models, API, tasks, integrations, search, workflow_engine)",
                "frontend": "static/app (React/TypeScript)",
                "admin_frontend": "static/gsAdmin",
                "tests": "tests/ mirrors src/"
            },
            "core_issue_model": "src/sentry/models/group.py:704 (class Group)",
            "notes": "Group represents one deduplicated problem in a project. It is the thing users triage, assign, resolve, and get notified about."
        },
        "step2": {
            "model": "Group",
            "location": "src/sentry/models/group.py:704",
            "key_fields": [
                {"field": "project", "line": 711},
                {"field": "logger", "line": 712},
                {"field": "level", "line": 715},
                {"field": "message", "line": 721},
                {"field": "culprit", "line": 722},
                {"field": "num_comments", "line": 725},
                {"field": "platform", "line": 726},
                {"field": "status", "line": 727},
                {"field": "substatus", "line": 736},
                {"field": "times_seen", "line": 746},
                {"field": "last_seen", "line": 747},
                {"field": "first_seen", "line": 748},
                {"field": "first_release", "line": 749},
                {"field": "resolved_at", "line": 750},
                {"field": "active_at", "line": 752},
                {"field": "time_spent_total", "line": 753},
                {"field": "time_spent_count", "line": 754},
                {"field": "is_public", "line": 756},
                {"field": "data", "line": 757},
                {"field": "short_id", "line": 758},
                {"field": "type", "line": 759},
                {"field": "priority", "line": 762},
                {"field": "priority_locked_at", "line": 763},
                {"field": "seer_fixability_score", "line": 764},
                {"field": "seer_autofix_last_triggered", "line": 765},
                {"field": "seer_explorer_autofix_last_triggered", "line": 767}
            ],
            "reference_patterns": [
                "Direct ORM references: FlexibleForeignKey('sentry.Group') in ~30 satellite models.",
                "ID references: BoundedBigIntegerField group_id in GroupCommitResolution, GroupRelease, UserReport, EventAttachment, GroupActionLogEntry.",
                "In-memory wrapping: GroupEvent (src/sentry/services/eventstore/models.py:698), BaseNotification (src/sentry/notifications/notifications/base.py:46), IssueLinkRequester.",
                "Frontend contract: Group type (static/app/types/group.tsx:1229), GroupStore (static/app/stores/groupStore.tsx:24).",
                "Identifier forms: integer id, short_id (PROJECT-123), group_id columns, and group_id in external events."
            ]
        },
        "step3_flat_dependents": flat,
        "step4_dependents_by_subsystem": step4,
        "step5_blast_radius": step5,
        "step6_non_obvious_dependents": step6,
        "step7_change_map": step7,
        "caveat": "This is the complete set of production dependents surfaced by Sense static analysis (Group callers, composition, and DB-level references). Runtime registrations, dynamic imports, and non-indexed scripts may add additional callers."
    }
